target: Review Bank Feature + iOS Design Refresh + Spaced Repetition
summary: All features verified. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests passed for Review Bank APIs and spaced repetition. Frontend: All vocab pages have iOS design (bg-[#F5F5F7], white cards, rounded-[20px], backdrop-blur headers). Review Bank shows flashcards with 'Got It!' and 'Still Learning' buttons.

features_tested.notes: bg-[#F5F5F7] background, white cards with rounded-[20px], shadow-[0_2px_15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)], backdrop-blur-xl header
bg-[#F5F5F7] background confirmed, fill-blank and matching exercises work
bg-[#F5F5F7] background, 10 questions MCQ, purple progress bar
bg-[#F5F5F7] background, 'Evaluate with AI' button, target word card, sentence textarea
Shows flashcards: word, 'Tap to see meaning', 'Got It!' (green), 'Still Learning' (red) buttons. Header shows count badges (9 to review, 1 mastered)
Shows 'All caught up!' with green checkmark, mastered count, Continue Learning button
Returns {words: [], total: int, mastered: int, to_review: int}
Adds word to review bank, increments mistake_count on duplicate
knew_it=true advances interval, knew_it=false resets to 1d
Wrong quiz answers automatically added to review_bank with category='quiz_mistake'
'Start Learning', 'AI Writing', 'Review Bank' buttons in vocabulary section

seed_data_creation: Test words prefixed with 'TEST_' added during pytest - auto cleanup not needed as words are unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review Bank and iOS design refresh fully tested. Review Bank at /review-bank shows flashcards with 'Got It!' and 'Still Learning' buttons. Spaced repetition: knew_it=true advances interval (1d->3d->7d->14d->mastered), knew_it=false resets to 1d. Quiz submission auto-adds wrong answers to review bank. All vocab pages use bg-[#F5F5F7] iOS gray background, white cards with rounded-[20px], subtle shadows, backdrop-blur headers.

review_bank_details.data_in_db: 9 words to review, 1 mastered for test user
review_bank_details.card_structure: word front, meaning back (tap to flip)
review_bank_details.stats_shown: Mistakes count, Reviews count, Progress bar
